calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Vacated

Mtn To Compel Private/Contractual Arbitration And Dismiss/To Stay Proceedings Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Defendant BRIAN GLENNON, Tel No. 415-452-8600 appearing in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BRIAN GLENNON'S Motion To Compel Private/Contractual Arbitration And Dismiss/To Stay Proceedings Pending Arbitration is granted. Notice of non-opposition to motion filed by plaintiff on October 2, 2015. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
